data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the integration of the "Now Serving" audio announcement, which is explicitly listed as a need in the use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this audio announcement feature. The existing evidence focuses on queue management and display updates but does not address the audio integration, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of "Now Serving" audio announcement integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
